scenario_goal: Ask GRC Agent to insert a byte throttle block named blocks_throttle2_inserted into the copied graph's wire from analog_random_source_x_0 output 0 to blocks_throttle2_0 input 0, using sample rate 32000.
allowed_user_behavior: Ask naturally to insert a throttle block on the wire from analog_random_source_x_0 output 0 to blocks_throttle2_0 input 0.
Include the new block name blocks_throttle2_inserted, byte type, and sample rate 32000.
forbidden_user_behavior: Do not mention internal tool names, JSON, schemas, or judge expectations.
Do not ask to edit raw YAML.
Do not ask to save or load.
